case_title: YI LI VS. HANA SKIN CARE ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUN-24-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KHANDIIMAA, DELGERMAA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2022 - CONTINUED FOR MOGOLIAN INTERPRETER TO AUG-22-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YI LI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS HANA SKIN CARE, REPRESENTED BY DELGERMA KHANDIIMA IS PRESENT. DEFENDAMT DELGERMA KHANDIIMAA IS PRESENT. COURT DETERMINES THAT A MONGOLIAN INTERPERTER IS REQUIRED FOR DEFENDNAT COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $512.00 FILED BY LI, YI AS TO DEFENDANT HANA SKIN CARE KHANDIIMAA, DELGERMAA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE - DELGERMAA KLANDIIMAA) SERVED JUN-24-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HANA SKIN CARE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-22-2022 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DELGERMA KHANDIIMAA, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT HANA SKIN CARE
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR MONGOLIAN INTERPERTER FOR DEFENDANT.
